notes: Stats and rules verified against Wahapedia datasheet.
Weapon list includes all options from the datasheet; the app may show only equipped weapons (policy question).
Points cost is the base Hive Tyrant cost before any weapon upgrades.
Keywords are the canonical 40k game keywords (all-caps on the datasheet).
FIXTURE REQUIREMENT: Needs 'Xenos - Tyranids.cat' loaded to test against live data.
To add the fixture: download from https://github.com/BSData/wh40k-10e and place in test/

knownDiscrepancies.note: Synaptic Imperative is not a standalone <rule> node in the BSData catalog; it appears as a named ability group / profile category header. The pipeline surfaces only materialised rule nodes, so this name is never emitted. Removed from expectedRules; absence is correct pipeline behaviour for this fixture version.
Warlord is a keyword / category tag in the BSData catalog, not a <rule> or <profile type='ability'> node. It is not expected to surface in the rules pipeline output. Removed from expectedRules.

BSData catalog stores the ability as 'Onslaught (Aura, Psychic)'; an external reference (Wahapedia) labels it 'Onslaught'. BSData is authoritative. The pipeline emits the catalog name verbatim. expectedRules uses the catalog name. External reference also describes the rule differently ('charge' text); catalog description references [ASSAULT] and [LETHAL HITS] — both describe the same mechanic. Not a pipeline issue; not a product bug.

Leader was previously absent from the Hive Tyrant dump. Fixed in M5 infoGroups traversal: _bindContainerChildren now recurses into infoGroup/infoGroups nodes, surfacing the Leader rule that was stored inside an infoGroup element. Confirmed present via regression pin test in unit_audit_test.dart.

BSData fixture reports M=8". BSData is the authoritative source of truth. An external reference (Wahapedia) shows M=10". This discrepancy means the BSData fixture was captured at an older catalog snapshot. Pipeline reads BSData data correctly. This is a documentation-only discrepancy; it does not drive code changes. Inspection test confirmed only one Hive Tyrant UnitDoc exists — not a wrong-variant-selected issue.
BSData fixture reports W=10. External reference shows W=14. BSData is authoritative. Catalog snapshot predates a stat update. Not a pipeline bug; not a product bug. Documentation-only discrepancy.
BSData fixture reports LD=7+. External reference shows LD=6+. BSData is authoritative. Same BSData snapshot discrepancy present in Winged Hive Tyrant. Documentation-only.
BSData fixture pts=195. External reference shows 210. Points costs are updated by Balance Dataslate; BSData snapshot predates this update. BSData is authoritative. Documentation-only.

knownDiscrepancies.weaponName: Monstrous Bonesword and Lash Whip / S stat
knownDiscrepancies.note: BSData fixture weapon profile has S=9. External reference shows S=12. BSData is authoritative. Catalog snapshot predates a weapon stat update. Documentation-only.
BSData Library - Tyranids.cat has older weapon stats. External reference shows updated stats. BSData is authoritative. Same BSData snapshot discrepancy in Winged Hive Tyrant. Documentation-only.

Tyrant Talons appears in external reference (Wahapedia) but is absent from this BSData fixture snapshot. BSData is authoritative. Weapon may have been added to BSData after this snapshot was captured, or is structured differently. Pipeline cannot surface weapons absent from BSData. Documentation-only.
Monstrous Bio-Cannon appears in external reference but is absent from this BSData fixture snapshot. BSData is authoritative. Documentation-only.
Monstrous Rending Claws appears in external reference but is absent from this BSData fixture snapshot. BSData is authoritative. Documentation-only.
Psychic Scream appears in external reference but is absent from this BSData fixture snapshot. BSData is authoritative. Documentation-only.

These weapons appear in the Hive Tyrant BSData entry but are not on the Wahapedia datasheet. They are valid optional weapon loadouts in the BattleScribe catalog. Policy decision: show all possible options vs only default/datasheet-listed weapons.

BSData entries include Crusade: Weapon Modifications, Crusade: Battle Honours, Crusade: Experience, and Crusade Points cost fields (all value 0). These are Crusade campaign cost fields present on all entries in the catalog. Policy decision: should these be shown in the app UI or filtered to pts-only?
